---
title: "ct-phrase-retrieval"
description: "Text-based CT image retrieval system"
date: 2024-03-01
categories: [retrieval, CT, NLP]
---

::: {.project-card}
[Active]{.project-status .active}

## Problem

Retrieving relevant CT images from natural language queries requires models that bridge the gap between clinical text descriptions and volumetric imaging data.

## Approach

A text-based retrieval pipeline for CT imaging. Matches natural language phrases to relevant CT images.

## Links

- [Source code](https://github.com/MahshadSa/ct-phrase-retrieval)

:::
